query: SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, status, duration, classification, recordingUrl, createdAt, updatedAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Michael Woody%' OR (teamMemberName LIKE '%Mirna Razo%' AND duration BETWEEN 25 AND 35 AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, status, duration, classification, recordingUrl, createdAt, updatedAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Michael Woody%' OR (teamMemberName LIKE '%Mirna Razo%' AND duration BETWEEN 25 AND 35 AND createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
